labels.description: The artifact or edge is declared and can be checked for existence only.
The artifact bytes are checked against a recorded digest.
The edge was observed from a declared pin, package coordinate, copied literal, or repo-relative source reference.
Reserved for post-XG-1 evidence attested by the certificate path; invalid for CS-0.2 Phase 0 vectors.
The artifact is declared in the governed set and is present, but does not conform to its declared class or contract shape.
A present artifact that is not declared in the governed set (governed:false). Ingestion must never treat it as authoritative or governed; it is neither owed nor checked.
A cross-repo edge whose counterpart repo has not adopted the contract (governed:false at the far end). The edge may be observed locally, but the far end is ungoverned and carries no adoption profile.

label_kinds.evidence: Evidence-strength axis: how strongly the artifact/edge is attested (presence -> hash -> realized -> certified).
label_kinds.governance: Governance-status axis: whether and how an artifact/edge is governed. Orthogonal to evidence strength.
